meta_title: Bar Website — Create Online in 5 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: Create a bar website with cocktail menu, events schedule, and reservations. Promto AI builder — fast and no technical skills needed.
og_description: Create a bar website with events calendar, cocktail menu, and table reservations. Promto AI — in minutes.
hero_subtitle: Attract guests: events calendar, cocktails, and reservations all on one website.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Ready in 5 Minutes
advantages.description: Describe your bar — AI will create a website with atmospheric presentation and needed sections.

advantages.title: Stylish Design
advantages.description: Templates for bars with emphasis on atmosphere, interior photos, and drinks.

advantages.title: Cocktail Menu
advantages.description: Publish drink and cocktail menus with descriptions and prices online.

advantages.title: Table Reservations
advantages.description: Built-in booking form — guests reserve a spot directly on your website.

advantages.title: Events Calendar
advantages.description: Post announcements for events, DJ sets, and themed parties.

advantages.title: Reliable Hosting
advantages.description: SSL certificate and stable website operation 24/7 without interruptions.

how_it_works.title: Describe Your Bar
how_it_works.description: Tell us about the concept, atmosphere, and signature drinks — AI will account for everything.

how_it_works.title: AI Generates the Website
how_it_works.description: Ready website with cocktail menu, events, and reservations will appear in seconds.

how_it_works.title: Customize and Publish
how_it_works.description: Add photos, update specials, and publish — the website will work immediately.

faq.question: Can I add an events schedule and calendar?
faq.answer: Yes, you can easily publish announcements for parties, DJ sets, karaoke, and other events with dates and descriptions.

faq.question: How does table booking work on the website?
faq.answer: A booking form is set up — guest selects date, time, and number of guests, and you receive the request.

faq.question: Is the builder suitable for a cocktail bar?
faq.answer: Yes, there's a convenient section for cocktail menus with drink descriptions, ingredients, and prices.

faq.question: Will the bar rank in search engines?
faq.answer: Yes, Promto websites are SEO-optimized — your bar will be found through Google and Yandex for local queries.

faq.question: How much does it cost to create a bar website?
faq.answer: Start for free — explore the platform's features. Paid plans unlock custom domain and additional features.

faq.question: Can I manage the website from my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, all features are accessible via mobile browser — add events and update drink menus anytime.

cta_mid_subtitle: AI will generate stylish design and all needed sections — you'll just need to add photos.
cta_final_title: Your Bar Deserves an Online Presence
cta_final_subtitle: Launch a website in 5 minutes and start attracting guests through the internet.
